title: Nuagé Argan Oil Cleansing Facial Wipes with Chamomile Extract for All Skin Types Cleanses Moisturises and Refreshes (25 pack)

features: GENTLE ONE STEP CLEANSE: These facial wipes help lift away daily build-up, makeup and impurities in one easy step. Perfect for evenings when skin needs a quick cleanse without a long routine.
MOISTURISES: Argan oil helps leave skin feeling soft, smooth and cared for while cleansing. Perfect for days when skin feels dull, dry or in need of a little comfort.
REFRESHES TIRED SKIN: Chamomile extract adds a fresh, soothing touch that helps skin feel revived. Great after a long commute, gym session or whenever a quick reset is needed.
SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: Made for all skin types, so it fits easily into everyday skincare routines. Handy for shared bathrooms, travel bags or homes where everyone likes simple skincare.
NOURISHING WIPE CLEAN: Argan oil gives these wipes a more caring feel while cleansing the skin. Ideal for anyone who wants a fresh, clean face without skin feeling stripped or tight after use.
QUICK AND CONVENIENT: When there is no time for a full routine, these facial wipes make life easier. Brilliant for late nights, weekends away or freshening up between plans.
description: Product Description Nuagé Argan Oil Cleansing Facial Wipes are a quick, easy way to cleanse, moisturise and refresh skin in one simple step. Designed for all skin types, these handy facial wipes help remove daily build-up, lift away makeup and leave skin feeling clean and comfortable without turning skincare into a chore. Infused with argan oil and chamomile extract, they bring a caring touch to everyday cleansing, making them a lovely choice for busy mornings, tired evenings and all those inbetween moments when skin needs a little pick me up. Argan oil is known for helping skin feel soft, hydrated and smooth, while chamomile extract adds a gentle, soothing feel that makes each wipe pleasant to use. Together, they help skin feel refreshed and look healthy, bright and cared for after every use. Whether it is part of a simple evening routine, a quick freshen up before heading out, or a practical skincare step after the gym, these wipes make looking after skin feel effortless. The resealable 25 pack is perfect for keeping at home or taking on the go. Pop them into a travel bag, handbag, gym kit or weekend case and enjoy a fuss free cleanse whenever needed. Ideal for removing makeup at the end of the day, refreshing the face after travel, or helping skin feel clean before applying moisturiser, Nuagé Argan Oil Cleansing Facial Wipes are a useful beauty essential to keep close by. For anyone looking for facial wipes with argan oil and chamomile extract that cleanse, moisturise and refresh, this pack delivers everyday convenience with a gentle skincare feel. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Ceteareth-12, Butylene, Glycol, Chamomilla, Recutita Extract, Ceteareth-20, Cetearyl Alochol, Cetaeryl Isononanoate, Panthenol, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Decyl Glucoside, Glyceryl Stearate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Benzethonium Chloride, Citric Acid. Directions Use wipe to clean face and neck Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. If product gets into eyes rinse thoroughly with clean water. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Avoid contact with fabric. Do not flush. See more
